summary: Completed testing of new schemes editing feature (schematic + stove scheme) in КУПЕЛИ > Контент admin section. All features verified working: Admin tab 'Схемы (купель + печь)' with data-testid='balia-content-tab-schemes', schematic section with title/subtitle/upload/parts editing, stove scheme section with 2 stove types (internal/external) each having title/subtitle/image upload/features/pros/cons. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements and data loading verified.
passed_tests: FEATURE: Admin > КУПЕЛИ > Контент has 'Схемы (купель + печь)' sub-tab with data-testid='balia-content-tab-schemes'
FEATURE: Schematic section shows title input, subtitle input, upload button (data-testid='schematic-upload-btn')
FEATURE: Schematic section shows editable description parts with data-testid='schematic-part-{i}'
FEATURE: Adding schematic parts works (+ Добавить button)
FEATURE: Removing schematic parts works (Trash button)
FEATURE: Stove scheme section shows section title and subtitle inputs
FEATURE: Stove scheme has 2 stove types: internal (data-testid='stove-type-edit-internal') and external (data-testid='stove-type-edit-external')
FEATURE: Each stove type has title, subtitle, image upload (data-testid='stove-upload-{id}'), features list, pros/cons
API: POST /api/balia/schematic/upload requires admin auth (returns 401 without)
API: POST /api/balia/schematic/upload accepts file and returns Cloudinary URL
API: GET /api/balia/content returns schematic field with title, subtitle, parts, image
API: GET /api/balia/content returns stove_scheme field with title, subtitle, types[]
API: POST /api/balia/content saves schematic and stove_scheme fields
FRONTEND: BalieSchematic component loads title, subtitle, parts from /api/balia/content (schematic field)
FRONTEND: BalieStoveScheme component loads title, subtitle, stove types from /api/balia/content (stove_scheme field)
FRONTEND: SVG fallback diagrams render when no custom image is uploaded
critical_code_review_comments: BaliaContentAdmin.jsx correctly implements schemes tab with data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Cloudinary upload endpoint at /api/balia/schematic/upload uses folder='wm-balia/schematic'
BalieSchematic.jsx and BalieStoveScheme.jsx correctly fetch data from /api/balia/content and fall back to SVG diagrams when no custom image
State management for schematic parts and stove features uses proper React patterns with spread operators
seed_data_creation: Test data created via API: schematic with 'Test Budowa Balii' title and 2 parts, stove_scheme with 'Test Jak dziala piec?' title and 2 stove types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested new schemes editing feature in КУПЕЛИ > Контент admin section. Key data-testids: balia-content-tab-schemes (sub-tab), schematic-upload-btn (upload button), schematic-part-{i} (parts), stove-type-edit-internal/external (stove sections), stove-upload-internal/external (stove upload buttons). API endpoints: POST /api/balia/schematic/upload (Cloudinary), GET/POST /api/balia/content (schematic and stove_scheme fields). Frontend components: BalieSchematic and BalieStoveScheme load data from API and fall back to SVG diagrams when no custom image.

schematic_section.details: Title, subtitle inputs, upload button (data-testid='schematic-upload-btn'), editable parts with add/remove

stove_scheme_section.details: Section title/subtitle, 2 stove types (internal/external) with title, subtitle, image upload, features, pros/cons

frontend_data_loading.details: BalieSchematic and BalieStoveScheme load data from /api/balia/content

svg_fallback.details: SVG diagrams render when no custom image is uploaded
